name: solution-factory
description: The Slalom Solution Factory — orchestrates the Frame → Draft → Polish → Ship pipeline for producing solution kits (8 deliverables) from idea to promoted artifact. Cowork-native: walks users through the intake via AskUserQuestion, sequences specialist skills across stages, applies brand and visual toolchain, routes promoted solutions to the right canonical home (10_Practice/Offerings/Solutions for DXP; 40_Library/Solution_Briefs for general).
author: Bermon Painter
